title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama. Chat with local LLMs from Python scripts or notebooks.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript / TypeScript client for Ollama. Works in Node, Bun, Deno and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat backend.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (now named Open WebUI). ChatGPT-style interface that talks to local models.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java / Kotlin client for Ollama. idiomatic fluent API, Android compatible.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama. Simple DSL to chat, generate and embed from Ruby scripts.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI frontend for Ollama written in Rust. Run chats inside the terminal with keyboard shortcuts.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Visual Studio Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset. Use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: function-calling, vision, PDF chat, voice, Docker Compose stacks, etc.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to chat with Ollama models inside the editor. Generate, refactor or explain code on demand.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for running Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-express
summary: Lightweight Express.js proxy that adds OpenAI-compatible endpoints to Ollama for drop-in replacement.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger SDK example showing how to spin up Ollama containers in CI pipelines for testing LLM features.

title: ollama-on-android
summary: Proof-of-concept that runs Ollama inside Termux on Android phones using CPU or Vulkan.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin that sends selected blocks to an Ollama model for summarization or Q&A.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian community plugin to run local LLMs via Ollama for note summarization and brainstorming.
